features: FACIAL CLEANSING BRUSH - 7 in 1 Facial Cleanser with Rotating Brush System removes dirt, oil and makeup traces much more effectively than washing with hands alone. It not only cleanses but gently exfoliates and massages skin, leaving it softer, smoother and more radiant. It helps to eliminate blackheads and erase fine lines and is suitable for all skin types.

SOFTEST BRUSH FIBERS - Premium quality brush heads - Massage skin to improve circulation and improve elasticity. Fit for all skin types, normal, dry, oily, especially safe for delicate sensitive skin.

SKIN CLEANSING SYSTEM - Electric rotating brush system cleanses the skin 10x better than hand washing alone and gently removes clogged pores, oil, dirt, and other impurities. This microdermabrasion system has two facial exfoliate brushes for different skin types. Cordless facial cleansing brush powered by 2 AA Batteries (not included)
TWO SPEED SETTINGS - Complete with 7 Inter-changeable Rotating Attachment Heads, with 2 Speed Settings. Lightweight and Compact Design Makes it Easy for Travelling
SIZE - H15cm x W7cm x D5cm / H6" x W3" x D2" (approx.). It gives you a complete facial cleansing; leave your skin looking youthful, healthy, and its absolute best. 100% customer-happy guarantee
